Dear (Their Company Name),

This letter acknowledges and confirms the agreement of IAG Media LTD (IAG) to provide The Company (ABV) in the area of marketing and/or content creation in accordance with the following terms and conditions (�Agreement�).

    1. Term:

Parties hereby agree that this Agreement shall come into force on 1st, July, 2017 and shall remain valid until one of the parties terminates the agreement in accordance to the terms below.

    2. Duties:

IAG has been retained to provide the following services:

    Management of all Facebook advert campaigns within this time
    Reporting of all results in an end of month report
    The creation & distribution of 15 pieces of content on (ZF)�s Instagram

    3. Payment:

IAG will send an invoice of L2,500 five days prior to the end of the month after which ZF will pay IAG within 5 working days.

In case of late payment IAG media remains the right to charge ZF statutory interest in accordance with UK law.

    4. Renewal:

This Agreement will be renewed automatically after the 18th of every month.

    5. Termination:

If ZF wishes to terminate the renewal of this contract he must give written notice to IAG before the 18th of the month. If notice is given after the 18th of a month this contract will be renewed for one more month after which it will be terminated. ]

6. Modification or Waiver:

The terms of this Agreement may be modified or waived only by written agreement, signed by both of the parties.

7. Creative Property:

IAG has the right to redistribute client content on its own social media � after ZF already published this content. If ZF wants a piece of content removed from IAG�s social media, ZF will send an email to IAG after which IAG has 48 hours to remove this piece of content.

8. Governing Law.

This Agreement shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Kingdom. Any and all disputes arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall in first instance be exclusively decided by the competent court in London.
